identity.canonical_title: Furiene Turbine Blade Pitch \& Helicity Geometry

theory.canonical_statement: ID 425 establishes the geometric optimization for the rotors interaction with the localized deltagnu [ID 404]. Unlike conventional turbine blades that interact with fluid pressure, the Furiene blades are pitched to "scoop" the volumetric displacement force generated by the Transinfinity. The helicity of the blade edges is mathematically tuned to the lemniscatic topology of the TZP to ensure laminar vacuum flow. By adjusting the pitch angle alphapitch relative to the rotational velocity omega, the system can maximize energy extraction (etaextr ) without inducing metric turbulence. This geometry ensures that the "Vibrating Code" is captured as a coherent torque taunet, which is then stabilized by the **Pi Model** synchronization logic [ID 422]. The blades are constructed from a carbon nanotube reinforced composite to withstand the localized g forces at the singularity interface.
